title: TxZoom
description: (lifestealsmp.com) Very lightweight OptiFine zoom (hold C for zoom).
body:
Very simple mod that adds OptiFine zoom feature. While zooming, it sets the FOV to 25.5 and hides your hand for maximum visibility.

Hold configurable keybind (defaults to C) to start zooming.

(Pressing & holding C to trigger zoom.)
![Zooming](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7546c9c1dbcf313141bed479df764d4242698763.gif)

Support server: discord.gg/lifestealsmp
